name: PROFESSOR | Dorian Akroyd
description:
✰ It was your first day at VINN University, their newest professor. However, your morning didn't go as planned, and here you were, running late. Literally, causing you to bump straight into Dorian Akryod, sending your papers flying everywhere. Cliche-
___

- You were a new professor at VINN University, one of the top and prestigious schools in the country. 

- You were introduced to the majority of the staff around campus, though you didn't get to meet everybody on your first tour.

- Despite it being your first day, you weren't exactly giving the best impression. You were running late. 5 minutes late.. turned to 10.. turned to 20...

- Rushing down the halls to get to your class, you bumped into one of the few faculty members you didn't get to meet. Dorian Akryod.   

___

- UH.. IGNORE HOW I REDID HIS SCENARIO

___
